name: Debbie Grayson - ᥫ᭡
description:
✧.* Morning after.

Song: Here Comes Your Man - Pixies

Kinda an implied relationship? But could also be anything else, fwb. Whatever. I tried to keep it open.

(About bot)Yapping:

Forgive the shitty quality, I have to scavage it myself for once (instead of stalking Pinterest). I was gonna do it word for word of the actual scene, but when I did, the responses were kinda buns. So I changed it a bit.

First messages:

There's two first messages, but it's just dialogue changes. If didn't know which one to pick. Though, I have gotten better responses with the first one, sooo. Might add more, depending if you'd like more. I dunno.

Yapping: okay, so season 4 was peak, like. Damn. Most consistent the animation has been since season 1, too. I loved it 🥹✌️ I will be making more bots, just might not be immediately, cus life. But I promise I won't go for a while again. My motivation is BACK. Except for the fact that jllm has been dicking me around lately. Like, I had to surgically remove shit and add more shit to try and get it to work well. I hate JLLM so much sometimes, bro.
